column1: 言うまでもなく、彼が最もふさわしい候補だ。
column2: いうまでもなく、かれがもっともふさわしいこうほだ。
column3: Needless to say, he is the most suitable candidate.
column4: 言うまでもなく (adverbial, needless to say)
column6: adverbial use: marks the following statement as obviously true
column8: 言うまでもなく = adverb meaning (needlessly to say); contrasts with は言うまでもない
column10: module:03-n3 jlpt:n3 point:言うまでもない2 complexity:standard frequency:top5k source:shin-kanzen frequency:top10k

column1: 言うまでもなく、環境問題は現代の最重要課題だ。
column2: いうまでもなく、かんきょうもんだいはげんだいのさいじゅうようかだいだ。
column3: Needless to say, environmental issues are today's most critical challenge.
column5: 言うまでもなく + universal fact
column6: introduces a broadly known fact as needing no argument
column8: 言うまでもなく is often used to frame a widely held premise in academic/formal writing
column10: module:03-n3 jlpt:n3 point:言うまでもない2 complexity:standard frequency:top5k source:shin-kanzen frequency:top10k

column1: 言うまでもなく、安全が最も重要だ。
column2: いうまでもなく、あんぜんがもっともじゅうようだ。
column3: Needless to say, safety is the most important thing.
column5: 言うまでもなく + superlative statement
column6: frames a widely accepted priority as self-evident
column8: 言うまでもなく placed before the most obvious principle in a list or argument
column10: module:03-n3 jlpt:n3 point:言うまでもない2 complexity:standard frequency:top5k source:shin-kanzen frequency:top10k

column1: 言うまでもなく、彼女の努力が成功の原因だ。
column2: いうまでもなく、かのじょのどりょくがせいこうのげんいんだ。
column3: Needless to say, her effort is the cause of the success.
column5: 言うまでもなく + causal statement
column6: frames a cause-effect relationship as obvious to all
column8: 言うまでもなく establishes a premise before adding further argument or nuance
column10: module:03-n3 jlpt:n3 point:言うまでもない2 complexity:standard frequency:top5k source:shin-kanzen frequency:top10k

column1: 彼のリーダーシップが優れていることは、言うまでもない。
column2: かれのりーだーしっぷがすぐれていることは、いうまでもない。
column3: It goes without saying that his leadership is outstanding.
column5: Clause + こと + は、言うまでもない
column6: predicate version at end of sentence for emphasis
column8: When は言うまでもない appears at the end, it adds rhetorical punch to the obvious
column10: module:03-n3 jlpt:n3 point:言うまでもない2 complexity:standard frequency:top5k source:shin-kanzen frequency:top10k complexity:advanced
